title: Add checkpoint cleanup, size guard, and failure node tracking
summary: Adds --no-checkpoint-cleanup flag to keep checkpoint files
Sanitizes checkpoint JSON: truncates long strings, replaces circular refs
Records active node id in checkpoint failure metadata
Cleans up checkpoint files after successful workflow completion

walkthrough.title: Implement checkpoint cleanup and safe serialization
changes: Sanitize checkpoint values to truncate long strings and circular refs
Track active node id for failure metadata
Delete checkpoint file after successful run unless disabled

walkthrough.title: Document checkpoint cleanup and schema
changes: Document checkpoint JSON schema and failure object
Note truncation and gitignore for checkpoint files

walkthrough.title: Add remaining work plan
changes: Lists checkpoint hardening and fix verification tasks

recommendations: Add unit tests for sanitizeCheckpointValue and cleanup behavior
Consider exposing checkpointCleanup in workflow input schema/docs
